description: Style NoteWhat could make you look better than a nice pair of heels while wearing a dress or a skirt? In fact, people wear heels even with jeans and it looks amazing. A nice pair of stilettos from catwalk is just what you need.Heel: 4.2& rdquo Product DetailsBlunt toed stilettos heels with gold footbedA transparent mesh at the forefoot with crystal embellishmentsCrystal embellishments on heel and heel baseTPU outsole and heel patch with pattern grovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
